title: Bulk
helpOutput:
Usage: bulk [<options>] <file>

  Run DNS lookups for a list of domains.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -T, --type=<text>    Record type (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, NS, SOA, PTR)
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <file>  File containing domains/IPs (one per line)
